global_description: A medium-sized bird with a striking contrast of a bright yellow head and a sleek black body. It features a pointed black beak and glossy black wings with white wing patches. The bird's tail is long and black, complementing its streamlined shape.

part_details.head: Bright yellow, rounded, with a small black eye.
part_details.body: Sleek, glossy black with a smooth texture.
part_details.wings: Glossy black with distinct white patches.

spatial_relations: The yellow head is positioned above the black body.
The wings extend from the sides of the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
